questionHtml: Draw, on the axes, a graph to show the variation with nucleon number A of the binding energy per nucleon, BEA. Numbers are not required on the vertical axis.
markschemeHtml:
curve rising to a maximum between 50 and 100 ✓

curve continued and decreasing ✓

 

Ignore starting point.

Ignore maximum at alpha particle
